_note: v4: game-anchored like the other v2+ recipes, banner compose style for the viral text look. v3 had no game slot at all, so 'palworld' purposes produced gorgeous but game-less macros.
template: {game} video game key art: {subject} from {game}, {emotion} expression, {composition}, signature {game} creatures and environment behind them, faithful {game} art style, {palette} palette, {lighting}, bold readable space for text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, extra limbs, cropped body, generic setting, unrelated game

composition: extreme close-up with space on the right

rubric.game_reference: 1-5 — is THIS game unmistakable (creatures, environment, art style)?
